# MAL Explorer

> Anime and manga discovery with multi-axis filtering and watchlists.

## Product

- [Home](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/): Discovery UI (SPA)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase

## Product surfaces

- [Search](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/search)
- [Discover](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/discover)
- [Schedule](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/schedule)
- [Random](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/random)
- [Stats](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/stats)
- [Quiz](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/quiz)
- [Collections](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/collections)
- [About](https://anime.significanthobbies.com/about)
